name: Bicycle
description:
The family is seeking assistance to obtain a second-hand bicycle for their 13-year-old son, who requires a reliable way to travel to school. He is approximately 1.6–1.7m tall, and a suitably sized bicycle is important for his safety and comfort. With a household income of $1.9k, the family prioritises essential expenses and is unable to afford a bicycle.

A second-hand bicycle would provide him with a practical and independent means of commuting and support his school attendance.
